gaps_union: Change in control provisions, including any severance or benefit enhancements triggered by an acquisition, and mechanisms addressing golden parachute taxation under Section 280G (such as a gross-up or a cutback to avoid excise taxes)
Change in Control definition and provisions (single-trigger/double-trigger, severance or equity acceleration upon a CIC)
Section 280G parachute payment tax mitigation (cutback to avoid excise tax or gross-up provision)
Change in Control definition and related severance/equity treatment
Section 280G tax exposure mitigation (e.g., cutback or gross-up)
